title: RecipesConfig
description: Configuration file that holds custom crafting recipes as used by the Survi plugin.

new_recipes.description: Map of internal recipe key -> recipe definition.

old_recipes.description: Array of namespaced keys of vanilla recipes that should be disabled (e.g. minecraft:iron_helmet).

result.description: Bukkit Material ou nom d'un Custom Item.

ingredients.description: Exactly 9 material names (row-major 3x3 grid). Use 'AIR' for empty slot.

shape.description: 1 to 3 strings, each 1-3 characters, representing crafting grid rows.

keys.description: Mapping of single-character symbols used in shape to Bukkit Material names.

Material.description: Nom du matériel Bukkit (ex: IRON_INGOT, EMERALD). Utilisez 'AIR' pour un emplacement vide.

CustomItem.description: L'identifiant de l'item personnalisé défini dans ECustomItem.java
